description_long: This is a large, round wheel of cheese with a wedge-shaped slice removed, revealing a smooth, pale yellow interior dotted with numerous round holes of varying sizes. The exterior and interior are both a consistent golden-yellow color, with the surface featuring a matte finish and scattered darker yellow spots that mimic the appearance of Swiss or Emmental cheese. The cheese appears solid and dense, with no visible rind or outer coating, and the cut surfaces are clean and even. The holes, or 'eyes,' are distributed throughout the body, giving it a classic cartoon-like cheese appearance. There are no visible brand markings, packaging, or additional decorative elements. The cheese is shown resting on an undefined, neutral background with no supporting surface visible.
description: A large, round wheel of yellow cheese with a wedge cut out, featuring many round holes throughout its smooth, matte surface. The cheese has a classic Swiss or Emmental appearance with no visible rind or packaging.
description_view_0: The cheese is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the round top with a wedge missing and several large holes visible on the top and side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the exposed interior where the wedge was removed, clearly displaying the distribution of holes inside the cheese.
description_view_2: The cheese is viewed from the opposite side, showing the round exterior and the missing wedge, with holes visible on the top and side.
description_view_3: The back of the cheese is shown, focusing on the uncut, rounded surface with scattered holes and no visible interior.
